name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Aloe Vera 10l
shortDescription: Keep your cat’s litter area spotless and naturally fresh with Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Aloe Vera 10L. This premium-quality bentonite clay litter delivers strong, instant clumping for effortless cleaning and excellent odor control. The soothing aloe vera scent not only neutralizes unpleasant smells but also creates a pleasant, refreshing environment in your home.
description: Keep your cat’s litter area spotless and naturally fresh with Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter – Aloe Vera 10L . This premium-quality bentonite clay litter delivers strong, instant clumping for effortless cleaning and excellent odor control. The soothing aloe vera scent not only neutralizes unpleasant smells but also creates a pleasant, refreshing environment in your home. Formulated to be safe, hygienic, and non-toxic , this litter effectively inhibits bacterial growth, making it ideal for both single and multi-cat households. With its dust-minimizing texture and superior absorption , you can count on a cleaner, more comfortable litter box. Available in a convenient 10L pack for long-lasting use, Proline ensures that maintaining your cat’s hygiene is simple, efficient, and worry-free.
